---
title: "Netflix Streaming Engagement Analytics"
description: "SQL data extraction and non-parametric statistical modeling in R investigating Netflix engagement habits."
image: "n_logo.jpg"
---

### Project Deliverables

::::: {layout-ncol="2"}
::: {.card .text-center .p-3}
[![](code_icon.png)](stats_167_final.pdf)

[**Code Script**](stats_167_final.pdf)
:::

::: {.card .text-center .p-3}
[![](slide_icon.png)](167_Final_Report-2.pdf)

[**Final Report (PDF)**](167_Final_Report-2.pdf)
:::
:::::
